content_of_post_to_comment: I live in Germany and these are some of the things that have happened to me in the last weeks. I got catcalled by 5 men in a van at midday My male colleague laughed at me for asking a question I had sex with a man on Saturday who was extremely sweet prior, but who did not give a damn if I orgasmed or enjoyed it at all, for that matter My uncle called me up this morning telling me to see my abusive father Last week a man ran full pelt at me in a train station until I ducked behind a male friend I had to sit through a conference that compared AI versions to girlfriends I had to sit through another presentation where the guy opened with ‘real men test in production’ I am taking a pause from dating, my nervous system is fried from simply existing in one of the safest places to be a woman that there is. I am privileged. I am white. I am able bodied. I live in a safe city. I cannot imagine what other women are going through, if this is what it feels like for me. Men, if you truly care about women, make it known.
